evals.name: dialect-cleanup-oracle-functions
evals.prompt: Optimize this dbt model — it was converted from Oracle and may have leftover syntax
evals.expected_output: Report identifying NVL, DECODE, SYSDATE replacements; all classified as SAFE
assertions: Report contains at least one D1-ORA finding
NVL is flagged with replacement COALESCE
DECODE is flagged with replacement CASE WHEN
All D1 findings are classified as SAFE
Report includes a summary table with counts by dimension

evals.name: cte-rewrite-unused-and-qualify
evals.prompt: Review this dbt model for code quality and Snowflake optimization opportunities
evals.expected_output: Report identifying unused CTE, QUALIFY opportunity, missing tests
assertions: Unused CTE 'unused_lookup' is flagged as D2-CTE-001 SAFE
ROW_NUMBER + WHERE rn = 1 is flagged as D3-QUAL-001 REVIEW
Missing not_null tests are flagged as D4-TEST-001 SAFE
Report distinguishes SAFE from REVIEW findings

evals.name: audit-column-edw-to-edwsf
evals.prompt: Check this dbt model for audit column naming issues
evals.input_inline:
{{ config(materialized='table', schema='mart') }}
WITH src AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('raw', 'N_ORDERS') }}
)
SELECT
    order_id,
    customer_id,
    amount,
    EDW_CREATE_DTM,
    EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
    EDW_CREATE_USER,
    EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM src
evals.expected_output: Report flagging EDW_* → EDWSF_* renaming and missing EDWSF_BATCH_ID
assertions: All four EDW_* columns are flagged as D2-AUDIT-001 SAFE
Missing EDWSF_BATCH_ID flagged as D2-AUDIT-002 SAFE (N_ prefix model)
All audit findings are auto-fixable

evals.name: dependency-ref-vs-source
evals.prompt: Optimize this dbt model for proper source/ref usage
evals.input_inline:
{{ config(materialized='table', schema='work') }}
SELECT
    a.id,
    b.name
FROM STAGING.WI_CUSTOMER_DIM a
JOIN {{ source('raw', 'WI_PRODUCT_DIM') }} b ON a.id = b.id
evals.expected_output: Report flagging raw table ref and wrong macro for WI_ prefix
assertions: STAGING.WI_CUSTOMER_DIM flagged as D2-DEP-001 SAFE (raw table reference)
source() for WI_PRODUCT_DIM flagged as D2-DEP-002 SAFE (should use ref())
Replacement uses ref() for both WI_ tables

evals.name: graceful-degradation-no-snowflake
evals.prompt: Optimize this dbt model (no Snowflake connection available)
evals.expected_output: Report with D1-D4 analysis completed; D5/D6 noted as unavailable
assertions: D1-D4 findings are present and complete
Report notes 'Live profiling unavailable'
No D5 or D6 findings are emitted
Skill does not error or crash

evals.name: trigger-phrases
prompt_variants: check this dbt model for Teradata syntax
review my dbt SQL for best practices
improve this dbt model after migration
should_not_trigger_prompts: convert this Informatica mapping to dbt
optimize all models in my dbt project
convert this Oracle stored procedure to Snowflake
assertions: All 5 trigger prompts activate the dbt-model-optimizer skill
None of the 3 negative prompts activate this skill
